no-restricted-syntax.message: Use var(--viewport-height) instead of '100vh'. iOS virtual keyboard shrinks the visual viewport but not 100vh, hiding content behind the keyboard. ViewportProvider updates --viewport-height via the visualViewport API. See project_plans/ux-overhaul/.
Use var(--viewport-height) instead of '100vh' in template literals. See project_plans/ux-overhaul/.
